name: scheduling
description: Run tasks on a recurring basis. Unit of work is a skill — scheduling providers execute plugin skills on intervals. Consumers describe what to schedule — Claude routes to the appropriate provider tool based on grants.

behavior.input: A task name, plugin, skill, interval (cron or human-readable), and enabled flag
behavior.output: Confirmation of schedule creation, or list of scheduled tasks, or removal confirmation
behavior.deterministic: Schedule operations must succeed or return explicit failure
